tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$110.50/bbl est. (Apr 6, +1.4% deadline anxiety); WTI $111.81/bbl confirmed (OilPriceAPI Apr 6). Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan); US F-15E downed Apr 3, both crew rescued - first US aircraft lost, confirms active air war over Iran. Kuwait desalination offline (Apr 4-5). April 6 8pm ET deadline active; tail risk 54%. Stress target $105-135/bbl; tail $160-185/bbl on Kharg seizure + Saudi output cuts. PTTEP and Medco cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed ceasefire and commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$110.50 est. (Apr 6, +1.4%); iTraxx Asia IG est. ~195bp (+7bp). ASEAN Energy Equities +2.5% (crude correlation); ASEAN Banks -2.2% on spread widening to 195bp. US F-15E downed Apr 3 (first aircraft lost) confirms active air war - no near-term Hormuz reopening. Kuwait desalination offline; deadline active 8pm ET. Tail risk 54% validates energy long / bank underweight. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire and commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 58.80 (Apr 6, -0.7%; PHP strengthening on bilateral deal). Philippines bilateral toll-free Hormuz deal persists, but Brent ~$110.50 est. still ~$40/bbl above import cost assumption; JKM ~$21.00/MMBtu est. Kuwait desalination offline; F-15E downed; April 6 8pm ET deadline active; tail risk 54%. PHP bilateral-deal rally creates re-entry level for short; stress target 61.00-62.00 intact; bilateral deal does not resolve fundamental oil import deficit.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. 16,850 (Apr 6, +0.6% IDR weakening on risk-off). Brent ~$110.50 est. still $40.50/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 7.25% (+15bp). US F-15E downed Apr 3; Kuwait desalination offline; April 6 8pm ET deadline active; tail risk 54%. Indonesia not on Iran 'friendly nations' list - full toll exposure. Stress target 17,200-17,800; tail target 18,000+. Tehran Toll Booth active; subsidy deficit structural. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~195bp (+7bp Apr 6); ASEAN HY est. ~570bp (+15bp). Tehran Toll Booth P&I restoration structurally impossible; tail risk 54%. US F-15E downed Apr 3 (first aircraft lost) + Kuwait desalination offline confirm active escalation. IRGC cyberattack threat on US tech firms still live. 215-230bp becomes the post-April 6 event-risk target if Kharg strikes proceed; Saudi output-cut risk from Kuwait/UAE attacks adds systemic upside. Hold CDS protection; April 6 deadline is the binary trigger.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$21.00/MMBtu est. (+4.3% Apr 6); TTF ~€52.40/MWh est. (+4.9%; Kuwait desalination offline drives EU gas demand fears). JKM-TTF spread widening: Asia bears physical LNG shortage. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel) constrains Hormuz LNG flows; Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. F-15E downed + Kuwait desalination offline reinforce no-resolution path; April 6 8pm ET deadline is binary trigger. JKM upside target $24-28/MMBtu on Kharg escalation; stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart and commercial Hormuz reopening.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~195bp; ASEAN HY est. ~570bp - spread widening on F-15E downing + Kuwait desalination offline. April 6 8pm ET deadline active; tail risk 54%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - April 6 binary outcome imminent.

PTTEP: THB window closed - TH 10Y est. 2.28% (+8bp Apr 6); USD/THB est. 33.70 (+1.0% risk-off). Brent ~$110.50 est. boosts upstream EBITDA by $40.50/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$21.00/MMBtu est. F-15E downed Apr 3; Kuwait desalination offline; April 6 8pm ET deadline binary. Execute H2 2026 prefunding via USD market now - THB opportunity closed; Gulf JV toll compliance review urgent.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent ~$110.50 est. and JKM ~$21.00 est. structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.287 (Apr 6, slight risk-off USD strength). iTraxx Asia IG est. ~195bp - spread widening on F-15E + Kuwait attacks. April 6 8pm ET deadline active; tail risk 54%; post-deadline escalation will close this window entirely. Execute revolving credit expansion and USD hedge before 8pm ET tonight.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 7%, stress 39%, tail 54%; Brent ~$110.50 est.; ASEAN HY est. ~570bp. JKM ~$21.00 est. sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Kuwait desalination plant offline Apr 4-5 (90% water supply at risk) - direct precedent for desalination/utility risk. Toll booth active; April 6 8pm ET deadline binary. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures before tonight's deadline outcome.
